name: Warps
description: Meta-modulator combining two audio inputs via selectable algorithms: crossfade, ring-mod, bitcrush, frequency shifter, vocoder, comparator, and more. Includes built-in oscillator as modulator.

controls.name: Algorithm (MODEL) Button
controls.description: Selects cross-modulation algorithm. 8 visible primary algorithms + alt-firmware extras.
controls.detail: 1: XFADE · 2: Folder/crossfolded · 3: Analog RM · 4: Digital RM · 5: Freq shift · 6: Bitcrush · 7: Comparator · 8: Vocoder

controls.name: ALGORITHM CV Attenuverter
controls.description: Scales CV on ALGORITHM jack enabling continuous morphing between adjacent algorithms.

controls.name: TIMBRE
controls.detail: Meaning varies: RM depth, bitcrush level, shift amount, etc.

controls.name: LEVEL 1
controls.description: Input 1 gain. Doubles as internal-oscillator timbre control when IN 1 unpatched.
controls.detail: With IN 1 unpatched: shapes internal osc waveform saw/tri/sine

controls.name: LEVEL 2
controls.description: Input 2 gain. Doubles as internal-oscillator pitch offset when IN 2 unpatched.
controls.detail: With IN 2 unpatched: tunes internal osc ±7 semitones around V/OCT

controls.name: OSC Button
controls.description: Enables internal digital oscillator as modulator source replacing IN 2.
controls.detail: When ON: IN 2 unused; LEVEL 2 tunes internal osc · OFF: IN 2 is modulator

inputs.name: ALGORITHM CV
inputs.description: CV for algorithm selection/morph. Scaled by attenuverter.

inputs.name: V/OCT
inputs.description: 1V/octave pitch input for the internal oscillator.

inputs.name: IN 1
inputs.description: Carrier audio input. External source processed against modulator.

inputs.name: IN 2
inputs.description: Modulator audio input. Disabled when internal osc enabled.
inputs.normalizedTo: internal modulator oscillator when OSC button ON

outputs.name: AUX
outputs.description: Auxiliary output — algorithm-specific byproduct (sum, difference, raw modulator, etc.).

outputs.name: MAIN OUT
outputs.description: Primary processed output of selected algorithm.

behaviors.name: Internal oscillator as modulator
behaviors.description: Built-in digital oscillator replaces IN 2 as the modulator. V/OCT tracks pitch, LEVEL 2 fine-tunes ±7 semitones. Warps becomes a single-module ring-mod/FM/vocoder voice — only a carrier is needed.

behaviors.name: Algorithm morphing
behaviors.description: CV smoothly morphs between adjacent algorithms. Crossfade-to-RM-to-shifter evolution is continuous, enabling dynamic processing that shifts character with modulation.

behaviors.name: Vocoder mode
behaviors.description: 20-band channel vocoder. IN 1 is carrier (pitched source), IN 2 is modulator (speech/drums/any wide-band). TIMBRE controls freeze/brightness. Classic robot-speech synthesis from modular signals.

behaviors.name: Frequency shifter
behaviors.description: Single-sideband frequency shifter shifts IN 1's spectrum by a frequency set by IN 2's pitch (or internal osc). Produces inharmonic klang, detuned clangour, pitch-shifted metallic shimmer.

behaviors.name: Comparator (XOR/ring/bin)
behaviors.description: Digital comparator produces square-wave harmonics from the two inputs' zero crossings. Generates aggressive lo-fi harmonics that track both inputs — useful for sub-bass grit and noisy leads.

behaviors.name: Parasites alt firmware
behaviors.description: Community alt-firmware adds dual oscillator mode, delay, feedback, and more algorithm slots. Still runs on stock Warps hardware via bootloader.

behaviors.name: Self-modulating carrier
behaviors.description: Patching Warps' output back into IN 2 creates audio-rate self-modulation. Depending on algorithm the feedback generates chaotic sidebands, runaway self-oscillation, or complex FM tones.

behaviors.name: Calibration
behaviors.description: Standard Mutable calibration mode via button combination. Tunes internal oscillator's V/OCT tracking and input gain normalization.

patchIdeas.name: Internal-oscillator ring-mod voice
patchIdeas.patch: OSC button ON · Algorithm: analog RM · external VCO into IN 1 · LEVEL 1 at unity · V/OCT from sequencer tracks internal modulator · TIMBRE at full · MAIN OUT delivers classic ring-mod bells
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
* Algorithm: 3 (analog RM)
* OSC: ON

- VCO (Out) -> Warps (IN 1)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Warps (V/OCT)
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Modular vocoder
patchIdeas.patch: Algorithm: 8 (vocoder) · chord VCO into IN 1 (carrier) · drum loop or speech into IN 2 (modulator) · TIMBRE controls brightness · MAIN OUT = talking drums/chords
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
* Algorithm: 8 (vocoder)
* OSC: OFF

- Chord VCO (Out) -> Warps (IN 1)
- Drum Loop (Out) -> Warps (IN 2)
- Keyboard (Pitch) p> Chord VCO (V/Oct)
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Morphing algorithm effect
patchIdeas.patch: Slow LFO into ALGORITHM jack with attenuverter at 2 o'clock sweeps through XFADE→fold→RM·→bitcrush · TIMBRE CV from envelope · one module delivers evolving processing that rewrites itself rhythmically
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
- VCO 1 (Out) -> Warps (IN 1)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> Warps (IN 2)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Warps (ALGORITHM CV)
- Envelope (Out) >> Warps (TIMBRE CV)
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Bitcrushed percussion
patchIdeas.patch: Algorithm: 6 (bitcrush) · drum loop into IN 1 · OSC OFF, no IN 2 (or LFO on IN 2 for sample-rate sweep) · TIMBRE at 3 o'clock (heavy crush) · MAIN OUT into mixer for lo-fi crushed drums
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
* Algorithm: 6 (bitcrush)

- Drum Loop (Out) -> Warps (IN 1)
- LFO (Out) -> Warps (IN 2) // varies sample rate
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Frequency-shifter shimmer
patchIdeas.patch: Algorithm: 5 (freq shift) · pad into IN 1 · OSC ON · very slow V/OCT ramp tunes shift amount over minutes · delay feedback → IN 2 not needed · MAIN OUT + AUX into reverb for shimmer trail
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
* Algorithm: 5 (freq shift)
* OSC: ON

- Pad (Out) -> Warps (IN 1)
- Slow Ramp LFO (Out) p> Warps (V/OCT)
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Delay (In)
- Delay (Out) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Feedback drone
patchIdeas.patch: Algorithm: 2 (crossfold) · single VCO into IN 1 · MAIN OUT patched back into IN 2 creating audio-rate feedback · TIMBRE dialed to edge of chaos · MAIN OUT into low-pass filter and VCA · self-oscillating warped drone
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
* Algorithm: 2 (crossfold)

- VCO (Out) -> Warps (IN 1)
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Warps (IN 2) // feedback
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Filter (In) -> VCA (In) -> Output (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Comparator bass grit
patchIdeas.patch: Algorithm: 7 (comparator) · sub VCO into IN 1 · second VCO detuned into IN 2 · harsh digital harmonics on MAIN OUT · AUX gives sum/diff for additional layer · aggressive industrial bass texture
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
* Algorithm: 7 (comparator)

- Sub VCO (Out) -> Warps (IN 1)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> Warps (IN 2)
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Filter (In) -> Output (In)
- Warps (AUX) -> Mixer (In) // sum/diff layer

patchIdeas.name: Envelope-modulated vocoder
patchIdeas.patch: Algorithm: 8 (vocoder) · carrier VCO into IN 1 · white noise into IN 2 for whispered texture · envelope on TIMBRE sweeps vocoder freeze per note · MAIN OUT through reverb · sustained breathy synth-choir pad
patchIdeas.diagram:
Warps:
* Algorithm: 8 (vocoder)

- VCO (Saw) -> Warps (IN 1)
- Noise (Out) -> Warps (IN 2)
- Keyboard (Pitch) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Envelope (Out) >> Warps (TIMBRE CV)
- Keyboard (Gate) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Warps (MAIN OUT) -> Reverb (In) -> Output (In)
